verification_gate: Every coverage row has bounded child-task families, every observed gap maps to those tasks, conflicting prior tasks have explicit dispositions, every processed NotebookLM claim maps to a task and verification queue where unresolved, evidence remains claim-scoped and provenance-preserving, no phase is empty, no task lacks a North Star path, and product execution remains closed.

gate_result.note: GRAPH-001 is the governance/certification task over the canonical task graph. The eight target source CSVs are the certified subject matter, produced and kept green by their child tasks (NBSOURCE-*, NBVERIFY-*, RECOVERY-*, GRAPH-002/003/004, STORE-001). They already satisfy every gate clause, so they were validated in place and NOT rewritten (surgical / heal-do-not-harm). Each clause below is checked against the live CSV state with concrete counts.

clause_1_every_coverage_row_has_bounded_.detail: Each of the 5 immutable North Star anchors carries a non-empty phase_task_ids family and a decomposition_status; every referenced task id resolves to a row in task_graph.source.csv.

clause_2_every_observed_gap_maps_to_thos.detail: All 45 current_state_gap rows carry a non-empty phase_task_ids list and a required_task_family; every referenced task id resolves to task_graph.source.csv.

clause_3_conflicting_prior_tasks_have_ex.detail: All 42 prior_task_conflict rows carry a non-empty disposition and canonical_task_ids; every canonical id resolves to task_graph.source.csv. Consistent with the GRAPH-002 reconciliation proof (42 conflicts, 0 empty disposition).

clause_4_every_processed_claim_maps_to_t.detail: Every one of the 396 NotebookLM claims carries task_ids and has exactly one verification-queue entry; the 323 unresolved (queued) claims each carry a next_action; the 73 resolved claims (17 verified + 19 refuted + 37 qualified) carry a resolution. All 32 registry sources are captured with non-empty mapped_task_ids and mapped_claim_count equals claim_count (396 = 396).

clause_5_evidence_remains_claim_scoped_a.detail: All 135 evidence rows are scoped to at least one real claim id and carry provenance (source_uri + exact_pointer + content_sha256/version_or_commit). The 7 notebook-source-relation rows that additionally cross-reference task_ids/conflict_ids (e.g. NBE-022 -> FOUNDATION-003, TASKCONFLICT-014) resolve entirely to real graph entities; there are zero dangling references.

clause_6_no_phase_is_empty.detail: All 27 declared phases hold at least one task and no task sits in an undeclared phase. Matches the north_star_coverage.report.json phases_decomposed check (pass).

clause_7_no_task_lacks_a_north_star_path.interpretation: North Star path = a dependency path from the task up the multi-parent DAG to the North Star root task LIFEOS-000. This is distinct from (and weaker than) the coverage gate's execution-opening 'tasks_anchored' check (direct membership in an anchor's phase_task_ids), which stays deliberately incomplete while execution is owner-gated. The path reading is the only one consistent with clause 8 (execution remains closed).
clause_7_no_task_lacks_a_north_star_path.detail: LIFEOS-000 is the sole root; all 196 tasks are reachable from it over the parent_ids DAG; every parent_id resolves to a real task; the graph is acyclic (north_star_coverage.report.json: dependencies_resolve=pass, no_dependency_cycles=pass).

clause_8_product_execution_remains_close.coverage_report_result: fail (fail-closed: coverage_complete + tasks_anchored + owner_opened_execution intentionally not satisfied)
clause_8_product_execution_remains_close.detail: owner_execution_approval is 'closed'; all 5 coverage-row execution gates and all 45 gap execution gates are closed-prefixed; no conflict gate authorizes open or out-of-graph execution. The coverage gate report result 'fail' is the intended fail-closed posture (execution stays closed until the owner opens it), consistent with the GRAPH-004 lifecycle proof (next_ready_task_id null while the coverage gate is closed).

gate_result.store_001_alignment: GRAPH-001 governs the graph in which the STORE-001 keystone decision and its downstream families (PGAUTH-001..006, POSTGRES-001..010, ADOPT-001/002) live. STORE-001 is a task in the graph, reachable to the North Star root, and appears in the phase_task_ids of all five anchors. GRAPH-001 does not open execution and does not reclassify any state class: no coverage row, gap, or conflict authorizes moving a redb-durable class off redb without the verified BlobStore SHA-256 parity cutover. STORE-001's tiered authority model (PostgreSQL+RuVector canonical durable owner; redb transient tier; AgentDB per-agent cognition; envctl forward-only bridge/projection; CodeDB ingestion) is preserved intact while execution remains fail-closed.

proof_summary: GRAPH-001 certifies that the canonical LifeOS task graph satisfies its eight-clause structural gate at this revision, with product execution held fail-closed. All eight clauses were validated in place against the live source CSVs (they are the certified outputs of child tasks and were not rewritten). Clause 1: the 5 immutable North Star anchors (NS-EXTENSION, NS-WHOLE, NS-CLARITY, NS-DIRECTION, NS-PROGRESS) in north_star_coverage.source.csv each carry a bounded phase_task_ids family and a decomposition_status, and every referenced id resolves to a task. Clause 2: all 45 current_state_gap rows map to non-empty phase_task_ids and a required_task_family, all resolving. Clause 3: all 42 prior_task_conflict rows carry an explicit disposition and canonical_task_ids (17 distinct dispositions), zero unmapped, consistent with GRAPH-002. Clause 4: all 396 NotebookLM claims carry task_ids and have exactly one verification-queue entry each; 323 unresolved (queued) claims carry a next_action while 73 are resolved (17 verified, 19 refuted, 37 qualified); the 32-source registry is fully captured with mapped_claim_count == claim_count (396 = 396). Clause 5: all 135 evidence rows are claim-scoped and provenance-preserving (source_uri + exact_pointer + content_sha256/version), and the 7 notebook-source-relation rows that additionally cross-reference tasks/conflicts have zero dangling references. Clause 6: all 27 declared phases are populated and no task sits in an undeclared phase. Clause 7: LIFEOS-000 is the sole North Star root and all 196 tasks reach it over an acyclic multi-parent DAG with zero orphan parents, so no task lacks a North Star path; this transitive-path reading is distinct from the stricter execution-opening 'tasks_anchored' coverage check, which stays deliberately open pending owner decision. Clause 8: owner_execution_approval is 'closed', every coverage and gap execution gate is closed-prefixed, and no conflict gate authorizes open or out-of-graph execution; the coverage report's 'fail' result is the intended fail-closed posture. STORE-001's tiered store-authority model is preserved and no state class is reclassified. No product code, schema, database, or live data was written; product_execution_performed is false.

live_commands.purpose: Validate all eight GRAPH-001 gate clauses against the live source CSVs (coverage families, gap mapping, conflict dispositions, claim->task->queue mapping, claim-scoped provenance-preserving evidence, no empty phase, every task rooted at the North Star via the parent_ids DAG, and execution fail-closed).
live_commands.command: python3 (GRAPH-001 eight-clause validator over task_graph.source.csv + north_star_coverage.source.csv + current_state_gap.source.csv + prior_task_conflict.source.csv + notebooklm_source_registry/claims/verification_queue/claim_evidence.source.csv + north_star_coverage.control.json/report.json)
output: clause4 claims=396 queue=396 one_per_claim=True no_task_ids=0 not_in_queue=0 orphan_queue=0 unresolved_no_next_action=0 resolved=73 queued=323 -> pass
clause5 evidence_rows=135 without_claim=0 missing_provenance=0 dangling_cross_refs=0 (7 relation rows cross-ref tasks/conflicts) -> pass
clause6 declared_phases=27 populated=27 empty=0 undeclared=0 -> pass
clause7 tasks=196 root=LIFEOS-000 single_root=True reachable=196 orphan_parents=0 no_path=0 -> pass
